title: Bankroll Ruin Calculator
description: Estimate the probability of bankroll ruin via Monte Carlo simulation.

results.title: Results
results.noResults: Fill out the form to see the results
results.whereYouEndUpHint: Final bankroll after 100 attempts. Each row is a slice of the {{count}} simulated runs.
results.attemptsToRuinHintNone: No runs went broke in this simulation.
results.attemptsToRuinHint: Average # of attempts before going broke (failed runs only).
results.payoutsCollectedHint: Out of up to 100 attempts. Expected: {{expected}} at {{rate}} payout rate.
results.maxDrawdownHint: Average peak-to-trough loss within a run. Above 50% means severe equity swings.
results.pReachTargetHint: Fraction of runs that hit the target bankroll at any point during the 100 attempts.
results.negativeEv: Negative EV: ruin only grows over time with this strategy.
